summary: Backend API testing for home feed artists fix and profile API endpoints - 15 PASSED, 1 SKIPPED
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix confirmed: Home feed API now includes 'artists' array in response
Backend routes/feed.py lines 162-191 correctly fetches and includes artists in HomeFeedResponse
Backend models/feed.py correctly defines HomeFeedResponse with artists: List[ArtistResponse]
Frontend lib/api.ts error handling improved - properly serializes error detail objects/arrays
Frontend lib/api.ts getCommonFriends correctly uses other_user_id parameter
Frontend profile.tsx correctly imports and uses translateCategory for business form categories

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed, 1 skipped due to no businesses in DB)
success_rate.frontend: Not directly testable (Expo React Native mobile app)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Home feed now returns artists array. User/Business/Artist detail APIs work correctly with proper 404 handling. Common friends API uses correct other_user_id param. Category translations in business form verified.

home_feed_artists_fix.previous_bug: Artists array was missing from home feed response

business_detail_api.note: Test skipped - no businesses in database to verify

common_friends_api_parameter_fix.previous_bug: Frontend was sending user_id, backend expected other_user_id

usage_locations: Line 896: Business creation form (root category chips)

home_feed_missing_artists.root_cause: HomeFeedResponse model was missing artists field and feed route was not fetching/including artists
home_feed_missing_artists.fix_applied: Added artists: List[ArtistResponse] to HomeFeedResponse model and added code to fetch artists in feed route

error_serialization.root_cause: Error detail could be string, array, or object but was being passed directly to Error without serialization
error_serialization.fix_applied: Added type checking and proper serialization for all error detail types
